_note: JSON cannot author SQL or .NET-detection configuration -- a JSON 'extensions' block is a hard build error (JSN019). This is a plain file-only installer. For SQL database + scripts and .NET runtime detection, use the C# fluent API: see demo/ 07 (Extensions Showcase, all four extensions in one project) or demos 31 (SQL) and 32 (.NET Detection).

downgrade.message: A newer version is already installed.
